message:
feat(store,command): real XINFO CONSUMERS metrics from PEL

- StreamConsumerInfo type changed from Vec<u8> to (name, pending_count, idle_ms)
- xinfo_consumers now computes per-consumer pending count by scanning PEL
- Idle time derived from most recent delivery timestamp per consumer
- stream_consumer_info_to_frame uses real values instead of hardcoded zeros

Closes: frankenredis-ajk

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
